前世的杨帆，是个二流子，人嫌狗厌，直到妻女去世，幡然醒悟。
只是这个家已经散了，后来的他赚再多的钱，也是孤家寡人。
杨帆本以为这一辈子就要这样遗憾而去，没想到一觉醒来，回到老婆女儿车祸前天。
这一辈子，他发誓，一定要尽自己的努力，给她们最好的生活！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5462db71b14be480b175ef9d0c3998a5","author":"辣鸡的uncle","author_id":"","book_id":"7132017101908216866","book_name":"跪在老婆女儿坟墓前哭，重生八三","book_short_name":"八零年代记忆","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3224人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7132017985757118976","read_count":"3224","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"377433"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"291","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,重生,奶爸,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b8b4ef69ae77b8736b60afed6b541112~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779471821&x-signature=b6enFEum1DY0sPkg0gFeqLWnw7E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"84593526228","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.622994e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324014341C90E3D1E7AD23F49918B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwar 吐槽：男主很“理想主义”，除了男主，男主的朋友（原狐朋狗友）、害朋友前世自杀的骗子头目，全部因为“仰慕男主的才能/想向男主靠拢”而 浪子回头、改邪归正了！！！如果在女频，评论区绝对一水的骂圣母。
